    Index

    A C D E F G H I K L M N O P Q R S U V 
    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values

    G

    generateSalt() - Static method in class com.example.passmanager.AES
    Salt is used to slow down brute force attacks for the passwords that do get validated and to decrease pattern recognition.
    getAccountByUsername(String, String) - Method in class com.example.passmanager.DBQueries
    Returns a SELECT statement to retrieve the PASSWORD and RANDOM_SALT for an account matching the given username and platform.
    getDateOfBirth() - Method in class com.example.passmanager.SignUp
    Returns the user's date of birth.
    getFname() - Method in class com.example.passmanager.SignUp
    Returns the user's first name.
    getId() - Method in class com.example.passmanager.AccountInstance
    Returns the database primary key ID associated with the account
    getKey() - Static method in class com.example.passmanager.Session
    Returns the session's AES key.
    getLname() - Method in class com.example.passmanager.SignUp
    Returns the user's last name.
    getPassword() - Method in class com.example.passmanager.AccountInstance
    Returns password associated with account, later gets encrypted and decrypted
    getPlatform() - Method in class com.example.passmanager.AccountInstance
    Returns the platform name for this account.
    getUsername() - Method in class com.example.passmanager.AccountInstance
    Returns the username for this account.
    getUsernameByID(int) - Method in class com.example.passmanager.DBQueries
    Returns a SELECT statement to retrieve the USERNAME for a given account ID.
